_backup_info.reason: spread_033 images were generated based on incorrect analysis (lithium mining instead of distorted face)
_backup_info.note: Original image files are still at docs/images/spread_033_opt_0.jpg and spread_033_opt_1.jpg

options.prompt: Create a black and white photograph/image: A lithium mining landscape — the Salar de Atacama's evaporation pools from aerial view preferred. The turquoise and white geometric pools against the desert landscape are strikingly beautiful in a way that ironizes the extraction they represent. Alternatively: the cobalt mines of Kolwezi, DRC, showing artisanal miners in a vast terraced excavation. The key quality: documentary realism. This is not a metaphor. This is the actual ground beneath the Cloud.
